methodology_sections: 1.1 Asset Inventory - Financial assets, state assets, privilege assets, reputation assets
1.3 System Architecture Mapping - Contract hierarchies, dependencies, upgrade patterns, access control
2.1 Entry Point Enumeration - Public/external functions, callbacks, parameter analysis

financial_assets: BLACK ERC20 held in VotingEscrow (normal locks) and transferred out on withdraw()
BLACK ERC20 burned via IBlack.burn()/burnFrom() for smNFT mechanics (permanent + bonus)
Bribe reward ERC20 balances held in Bribe contracts (multiple tokens, incl. connector tokens via TokenHandler)
RewardsDistributor reward token balance (BLACK) distributed weekly via claim/claim_many
BlackClaims seasonal reward BLACK balances pulled from treasury via transferFrom and optionally staked into VotingEscrow
ERC721 veNFTs (VotingEscrow) representing escrow positions (transferable with restrictions)
AutoVotingEscrow-held veNFT custody (locks array) while auto-voting enabled
state_assets: VotingEscrow ERC721 ownership/approvals/operator approvals and enumeration mappings
VotingEscrow delegation state: _delegates, nonces, cpData.checkpoints/numCheckpoints (per-delegate tokenId sets)
VoterV3 votes[tokenId][pool], poolVote[tokenId] list, weights[pool], totalWeight, usedWeights[tokenId], lastVoted/lastVotedTimestamp
Bribe tokenRewardsPerEpoch[token][epoch], lastEarn[token][tokenId], per-tokenId balanceOf, totalSupply, checkpoints and supplyCheckpoints
AutoVotingEscrowManager: avms array, tokenIdToAVMId mapping, nextAvailableAVMIndex, strategies, executor, minBalanceForAutovoting, rewardsDistributor
AutoVotingEscrow: locks array and tokenIdIndex mapping
PermissionsRegistry: blackMultisig/blackTeamMultisig/emergencyCouncil, role sets and role membership lists
TokenHandler: token and NFT whitelists, connector set, volatility buckets and bucket types
BlackClaims: season struct, season_rewards, claimed_rewards, treasury, owners
RewardsDistributor: tokens_per_week, ve_supply (unused in shown code), time_cursor_of, token_last_balance, depositor/owner/avm pointers
privilege_assets: VotingEscrow.team authority (setTeam, setArtProxy, setVoter, setAVM, toggleSplit, setSmNFTBonus)
VoterV3 OwnableUpgradeable.owner() (setEpochOwner) and VOTER_ADMIN role via PermissionsRegistry (setPermissionsRegistry, setMaxVotingNum, setAVM, setGaugeManager)
Bribe.owner and bribeFactory privileged operations (recover/emergencyRecover, setVoter, setGaugeManager, setMinter, setAVM, setOwner)

AutoVotingEscrowManager OwnableUpgradeable.owner() (setVoter, setTopPoolsStrategy, setVoteWeightStrategy, setTopN) and executor role (performLockAction); executor can be changed by current executor or owner
SetterTopNPoolsStrategy Ownable.owner() and executor privileges to setTopNPools; owner/executor can setExecutor
SetterVoteWeightStrategy Ownable.owner() and executor privileges to setVoteWeights; owner/executor can setExecutor
PermissionsRegistry.blackMultisig (role admin for add/remove roles, assign/unassign roles, update multisigs; emergencyCouncil can change itself)
TokenHandler governance roles (GOVERNANCE, GENESIS_MANAGER) to whitelist/blacklist tokens/NFTs/connectors and set volatility buckets
BlackClaims owner/secondOwner (setTreasury, startSeason, reportRewards, finalize, extendClaimDuration, revokeUnclaimedReward, recoverERC20, setOwner/setOwner2)
RewardsDistributor.owner (setDepositor, setOwner, withdrawERC20, setAVM) and depositor-only checkpoint_token
VeArtProxyUpgradeable owner (standard OwnableUpgradeable functions; initialize sets owner)
veNFTAPI owner (setOwner and all setter functions)
reputation_assets: veNFT voting power and delegation checkpoints used for governance (IBlackHoleVotes/IVotes compatibility)
Gauge emission direction derived from VoterV3 weights/totalWeight (affects LP rewards and bribe attractiveness)
AVM executor-controlled voting behavior (top pools/weights) affecting protocol fairness and trust
PermissionsRegistry role integrity (governance/admin permissions) as a system-wide trust root

contracts_analyzed: Interfaces (IVotingEscrow, IVoter, IBribe, IBlackHoleVotes, IVeArtProxy, IBlack, IAutomatedVotingManager, ITokenHandler, IRewardsDistributor, ITopNPoolsStrategy, IVoteWeightStrategy, IBlackClaims, IMinter, IERC20, IPermissionsRegistry, IGaugeManager, IAutoVotingEscrow, IAutoVotingEscrowManager)
system_architecture.inheritance_hierarchy: VotingEscrow implements IERC721, IERC721Metadata, IBlackHoleVotes (IVotes). VoterV3 is OwnableUpgradeable + ReentrancyGuardUpgradeable. Bribe is ReentrancyGuard. AutoVotingEscrowManager is Initializable + OwnableUpgradeable + ReentrancyGuardUpgradeable. VeArtProxyUpgradeable is OwnableUpgradeable. veNFTAPI is Initializable (custom owner variable, not OZ Ownable). SetterTopNPoolsStrategy and SetterVoteWeightStrategy are OZ Ownable. TokenHandler and PermissionsRegistry are standalone. RewardsDistributor, AutoVotingEscrow standalone.
external_dependencies: OpenZeppelin: IERC721/IERC721Metadata/IERC721Receiver, IVotes, OwnableUpgradeable, ReentrancyGuardUpgradeable, SafeERC20Upgradeable, IERC20Upgradeable, Ownable, ReentrancyGuard, SafeERC20, Math (OZ)
Protocol-specific interfaces: IVoter, IGaugeManager, IMinter, IVotingEscrow, IRewardsDistributor, ITokenHandler, IAutoVotingEscrowManager, IAutoVotingEscrow
Custom libraries: BlackTimeLibrary, VotingDelegationLib, VotingBalanceLogic, Base64, Math (custom)
system_architecture.upgrade_patterns: Mixed. Some contracts are upgradeable via OpenZeppelin Initializable pattern (VoterV3, AutoVotingEscrowManager, VeArtProxyUpgradeable, veNFTAPI). Others are non-upgradeable deployments. No proxy contract code shown; upgrade mechanism depends on deployment (likely Transparent/UUPS proxies for upgradeable contracts). No Diamond pattern present.
system_architecture.access_control_structure: Multiple roots: (1) VotingEscrow uses simple 'team' address for admin functions and 'voter' address for attach/detach/voting toggles; (2) VoterV3 combines OwnableUpgradeable (epochOwner setter) with PermissionsRegistry roles (VOTER_ADMIN/GOVERNANCE/GENESIS_MANAGER); (3) PermissionsRegistry is a central role registry controlled by blackMultisig; (4) AutoVotingEscrowManager uses OwnableUpgradeable plus an 'executor' address for epoch actions; (5) Bribe uses owner or bribeFactory; (6) TokenHandler gates actions by PermissionsRegistry roles; (7) RewardsDistributor uses owner and depositor; (8) Several strategy setter contracts use Ownable plus executor.

state_changes: locked[_tokenId] (end and/or flags and amount if SMNFT upgrade)
external_calls: IBlack(token).burn(_value) (when converting to SMNFT via updateToSMNFT)

state_changes: cpData checkpoints (burn delegate movement for _from; no transfer for _to)
votingBalanceLogicData histories (checkpoint for burn and new mints)
cpData checkpoints (burn delegate movement for _from; mint delegate movement for new tokens)

upgradeability_surface.notes: Non-upgradeable constructor-based deployment. Custom reentrancy guard.

Upgradeable (OwnableUpgradeable/ReentrancyGuardUpgradeable). Deployment likely behind proxy; ensure initialize() called once and implementation cannot be initialized by attacker (use _disableInitializers in implementation constructor).
Upgradeable manager. initialize() sets executor=msg.sender; if uninitialized implementation reachable, attacker can seize executor/owner in that context.
Upgradeable art proxy; only state is OwnableUpgradeable. Ensure implementation protected from initialization.

Upgradeable but does not inherit OZ Ownable; uses custom owner variable. If implementation is uninitialized or initializer not properly protected via proxy deployment, owner can be seized. Also contains debug import 'hardhat/console.sol' which is unsafe for production builds.
Non-upgradeable. Uses huge fixed-size arrays tokens_per_week/ve_supply which impacts deployment/storage cost.
Non-upgradeable role registry; blackMultisig is system trust root.
Non-upgradeable Ownable; executor is separate privileged actor.
Non-upgradeable Ownable; executor is separate privileged actor.
Non-upgradeable per-instance AVM vault deployed by manager.
